name: omni-model-cloudflare
description: Deployable Cloudflare Worker for omni-model (root wrangler.jsonc points here).

scripts.artifacts: wrangler deploy --dry-run --outdir ../../.artifacts --config wrangler.prebuilt.jsonc && cp ../../.artifacts/prebuilt.js ../../.artifacts/worker.js && cp prebuilt/wrangler.jsonc ../../.artifacts/
